name: PYMEs con IA — WhatsApp Lead Response Agent (IMPORT TEMPLATE)

parameters.jsCode:
const row = { timestamp: $json.received_at || new Date().toISOString(), business_name: $env.BUSINESS_NAME || '', customer_phone: $json.customer_phone || '', customer_name: $json.lead_name || $json.customer_name || '', inbound_message: $json.message_text || '', response_text: $json.response_text || '', lead_stage: $json.lead_stage || '', lead_need: $json.lead_need || '', urgency: $json.urgency || '', handoff_required: String(Boolean($json.handoff_required)), handoff_reason: $json.handoff_reason || '', message_id: $json.message_id || '' };
return [{ json: { ...$json, lead_log_row: row, lead_log_values: Object.values(row) } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.customer_phone, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.response_text } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, message_id: $json.message_id, customer_phone: $json.customer_phone, lead_stage: $json.lead_stage, handoff_required: $json.handoff_required, logged: true, replied: true } }];

const err = $json.execution || $json; return [{ json: { text: `Error en workflow WhatsApp Agent (${ $env.BUSINESS_NAME || 'PYME' }). Revisa n8n. Execution: ${err.id || 'desconocida'}`, error: err } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $env.OWNER_WHATSAPP, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.text } }) }}

meta.notes: Import template. Replace placeholder credentials and env vars before activation.
